mapper.update: UPDATE nx_machine_alert_record SET nx_ar_is_cleared = 1, nx_ar_clear_time = NOW() WHERE nx_ar_device_id = #{deviceId} AND nx_ar_is_cleared = 0
UPDATE nx_machine_alert_record SET nx_ar_is_read = 1, nx_ar_read_time = NOW() WHERE nx_ar_id = #{recordId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nx_machine_alert_record WHERE nx_ar_manager_id = #{managerId} AND nx_ar_is_read = 0
AND nx_ar_create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
mapper.update: UPDATE nx_machine_alert_record SET nx_ar_send_status = #{sendStatus}, nx_ar_send_time = NOW() WHERE nx_ar_id = #{recordId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nx_machine_alert_record ( nx_ar_device_id, nx_ar_manager_id, nx_ar_alert_level, nx_ar_paper_count, nx_ar_message, nx_ar_send_status, nx_ar_is_cleared, nx_ar_is_read, nx_ar_create_time ) VALUES ( #{nxArDeviceId}, #{nxArManagerId}, #{nxArAlertLevel}, #{nxArPaperCount}, #{nxArMessage}, #{nxArSendStatus}, 0, 0, NOW() )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM nx_machine_alert_record WHERE nx_ar_id IN
#{nxArId}
